data.title: Fed’s Bowman confirmed as vice chair for supervision; Lummis calls it a win for crypto
data.description:
Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman was confirmed by the Senate on Wednesday to serve the top regulatory role at the central bank.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357078/bowman-confirmed-as-fed-vice-chair-of-supervision?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Solo Bitcoin miner earns $330K reward by solving block
data.description:
5-6-2025 – A solo Bitcoin miner has successfully solved a cryptographic puzzle and secured a new block on the blockchain, according to data shared by Onchain Lens. The miner earned 3. 151 BTC, currently valued at approximately $330,000, for their efforts.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/solo-bitcoin-miner-earns-330k-reward-by-solving-block/

data.title: Cipher Mining Reports May Bitcoin Production and Expansion Plans
data.description:
According to PANews, Cipher Mining (NASDAQ: CIFR) has released its operational data for May. The company produced approximately 179 bitcoins during the month, which includes around 4 bitcoins equivalent from power sales and about 23 bitcoins from a joint venture data center. Cipher Mining sold 64 bitcoins in May, ending the month with a total holding of 966 bitcoins, of which approximately 334 are used as collateral.

By the end of May, Cipher Mining had deployed 75,000 mining machines, achieving an operational hash rate of 13.5 EH/s with a machine efficiency of 18.9 J/TH. The company is advancing the construction of its Black Pearl data center in Texas, with the first phase nearing completion. Old mining machines from the Odessa upgrade project have been relocated and installed, awaiting power connection. Cipher Mining has purchased the remaining machines to fill the first phase's 150 MW power capacity at Black Pearl, with new machines expected to arrive and be deployed by early July. Once deployment is complete, the company's projected hash rate is expected to increase from the current 13.5 EH/s to approximately 23.1 EH/s.

data.title: Sunrise Secures $3 Million Seed Funding to Enhance Interoperability Protocol
data.description: According to Odaily, Sunrise, a decentralized application (DA) interoperability protocol, has successfully raised $3 million in a seed funding round. The investment was led by Decima, with participation from Animoca Brands Japan, Hyperithm, Cogitent Ventures, MZ Web3 Fund, V3V Ventures, Connectico Capital, and MH Ventures. The newly acquired funds are intended to support the integration of data availability layers and liquidity center functionalities into a unified platform backed by Proof-of-Liquidity. This initiative aims to facilitate liquidity sharing across the platform.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$56.978 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 13 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 4, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$56.978 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$73.1835 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.804 billion.
The second is Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$7.4194 million, and the current total net inflow of ETH has reached US$685 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of US$23.6248 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.539 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.877 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.14%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.290 billion.

data.title: U.S. Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, monitoring data from Farside indicates that the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $57 million yesterday.

data.title: Crypto wearable leader CUDIS holds pre-TGE special Space
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the leading crypto wearable project CUDIS will hold a pre-TGE special Space at 12:00 today, hosted by CUDIS founder Edison. Topics include token economics, Season 1 review, Season 2 trailer, future roadmap, etc.
Previous news, Binance Wallet exclusive TGE will launch CUDIS, the subscription time is from 4 to 6 pm on June 5, 2025 (UTC+8), and eligible users must use Binance Alpha points to participate.

data.title: BitMine Completes $18 Million Financing Through Stock Offering, Net Proceeds to Be Used to Purchase Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining company BitMine Immersion Technologies (NYSE American: BMNR) announced the completion of a public offering of 2.25 million shares, priced at $8 per share, raising a total of $18 million. The company plans to use the net proceeds to directly purchase Bitcoin.
At the same time, BitMine shares have been approved for listing on the NYSE American exchange on June 5, with the stock code "BMNR", and the original OTCQX market trading will be terminated simultaneously. (GlobeNewswire)

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $86.9216 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF IBIT achieving net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 4, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 86.9216 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of 284 million US dollars in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached 48.781 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net outflow of 197 million US dollars in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached 11.496 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 126.665 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 6.09%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 44.567 billion US dollars.

data.title: The top three currencies in Gate Alpha’s trading volume yesterday: LABUBU, BOB, ELDE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, the top three currencies in Gate Alpha's daily trading volume on June 4 were: LABUBU, BOB and ELDE.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in their spot accounts to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies Completes Public Offering and Plans Bitcoin Purchase
data.description:
According to PANews, BitMine Immersion Technologies, a Bitcoin mining company, has announced the completion of its public offering of 2.25 million shares, priced at $8 per share, raising a total of $18 million. The company intends to use the net proceeds for the direct purchase of Bitcoin.

Additionally, BitMine's stock has been approved for listing on the NYSE American exchange under the ticker symbol 'BMNR' as of June 5. This move will coincide with the termination of its trading on the OTCQX market.

data.title: Crypto Prices Breakout Under Threat As US Recession Risk Falls To 28%
data.description:
Crypto prices are in the spotlight as new data shows that US recession risk has reduced to 28%, down from 70% of last month’s expectations. This dramatic decline follows a wave of positive economic signs and has stirred conversations about what it means for the financial markets.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/04/us-recession-risk-falls-to-28-is-crypto-market-breakout-under-threat/

data.title: An address suspected to be associated with Consensys purchased $320 million worth of ETH from Galaxy Digital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, a whale address associated with Consensys purchased $320 million worth of ETH from Galaxy Digital and transferred it to the new address 0x0b2, of which $120 million of ETH has been pledged through Liquid Collective.

data.title: Analyst: Robinhood is expected to be included in the S&P 500 index, which may trigger a large-scale purchase of passive funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BofA analysts pointed out that Robinhood Markets Inc. is the "prime candidate" in the S&P 500 index adjustment to be announced this Friday. The stock has recently hit a nearly four-year high as the stock market and crypto market rebounded. If included, it is expected to trigger concentrated buying by passive funds tracking the index. Coinbase's stock price rose 34% in the week when it was previously included. Analysts also mentioned that companies such as Ares Management, Carvana and AppLovin also have the potential to be selected. (Bloomberg)

data.title: More than 60% of addresses lost money in Pump.fun transactions, and more than 1,000 people lost more than $100,000
Binance Completes Hashflow (HFT) Integration on Solana Network
data.description:
According to Binance's official announcement, the integration of Hashflow (HFT) on the Solana network has been successfully completed. This development allows users to deposit and withdraw HFT tokens on the Solana blockchain, enhancing the accessibility and utility of the token within the Binance ecosystem.

- **Integration Details**: Binance has finalized the integration process for Hashflow (HFT) on the Solana network, enabling deposits and withdrawals. Users can find their assigned token deposit addresses on the Binance platform. Additionally, the smart contract address for HFT on the Solana network is available for users seeking technical details.

- **Important Notes**: Binance advises users to refer to the original English version of the announcement for the most accurate information, as discrepancies may exist between the English content and translated versions. This ensures users have the most reliable details regarding the integration.

- **USDC Information**: USDC, an e-money token issued by Circle Internet Financial Europe SAS, is also highlighted in the announcement. Holders of USDC have a legal claim against Circle SAS, the EU issuer, and are entitled to request redemption at any time at par value. For further inquiries, Circle can be contacted via phone or email.

This integration marks a significant step in expanding the functionality and reach of Hashflow (HFT) within the Binance platform, providing users with more options for managing their digital assets.

data.title: Bitcoin eyes $115K by July, but strong US job data to threaten rally: Analysts
data.description:
Bitfinex analysts tell Cointelegraph that Bitcoin could surge next month if US job data turns out to be weaker than expected.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-new-highs-july-us-jobs-data-threat-uptrend-analysts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
